task: Create a Python function that extracts the region from an AWS S3 bucket ARN (e.g., 'arn:aws:s3:::my-bucket-us-west-2' should return 'us-west-2')
Generate a JSON object for an AWS CloudWatch alarm that monitors EC2 CPU utilization above 80% for 2 consecutive periods of 5 minutes each
Write a regular expression that validates AWS IAM role names according to AWS naming conventions (1-64 characters, alphanumeric plus +, =, ., @, -, and _ characters)
